description:
A nightly HR synchronization process is failing because of dirty data in the feed. Synchronize the staging table EMPLOYEE_UPDATES into the production EMPLOYEES table using a resilient merge process. The operation must update existing employees (matching on EMPLOYEE_ID) with new Salary, Commission_PCT, and Job_ID, and insert new employees. Capture any constraint violations in an error logging table named ERR_EMPLOYEES_LOG instead of allowing the synchronization to fail. Export the contents of the error log table with headers to /home/ga/Desktop/sync_errors.csv.

Connection: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
